globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.ciamlogin.com https://login.microsoftonline.com https://graph.microsoft.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.ciamlogin.com https://login.microsoftonline.com; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
